vivid_elegant_otter_pop: KTP is the abbreviation for Complete Transformer Substations. Such substations are used to step down the voltage when current is transmitted from a high-voltage line to the consumer network. Prefabricated transformer substations enable the reception of three-phase electricity (50 Hz) with a voltage ranging from 6 kV to 10 kV and convert it into electricity with a voltage of 0.4 kV (380 V). A prefabricated transformer substation comprises a power transformer, a high-voltage input unit and a low-voltage input unit.

antsy_only_emu_buzz: A welding inverter is a device that converts frequency and voltage, followed by the rectification of alternating current to direct current. To achieve this, a variety of power electronic components are used, such as: a diode bridge, various capacitors, MOSFET or IGBT power transistors, a power transformer, diode assemblies, a choke, a control board and much more.
zesty_last_panda_slide: During the repair, original or superior quality components are used, waveforms are removed from control points, parameters are checked on static and dynamic loading, component replacement sites are covered with acrylic insulating varnish.
slow_early_wolf_hope: The cost of repairs is determined after diagnosis. By contacting us, you can be  confident in the competence of specialists and the quality of the work carried out.

dark_less_butterfly_startle: The main difference between a welding inverter semi-automatic and a welding inverter is the presence of a wire feed mechanism, a gas path, as well as a modified feedback circuit. If a welding inverter provides current feedback, then a semi-automatic inverter provides voltage feedback.  The main components are not much different from the manual arc welding inverter.
sad_dry_frog_hunt: During the repair, original or superior quality components are used, waveforms are removed from control points, parameters are checked on static and dynamic loading, component replacement sites are covered with acrylic insulating varnish.

dizzy_least_marmot_pet: Resanta, Aurora, Foxweld, Cedar, Blueweld, Telwin, Svarog, Diold, Profi (Rilon), Feji, as well as many other brands. The air plasma cutting machine, unlike the welding inverter, has a higher output voltage. This is necessary for the steady burning of plasma arc and is achieved by lowering the transformer coefficient of the power transformer.Gorenje The same air plasma cutting machines have a gas path, a special plasma torch and an oscillator.
sad_sleek_fox_fade: During the repair, original or superior quality components are used, waveforms are removed from control points, parameters are checked on static and dynamic loading, component replacement sites are covered with acrylic insulating varnish.
ok_petty_loris_gulp: The service center specializes in repairing argon arc installations installations: Resanta, Aurora, Foxweld,Cedar, Blueweld, Telwin, Svarog, Profi (Rilon), Feji, Bimark, Brima and many others.
lime_tiny_anteater_soar: Argon arc installations can be divided into 2 classes: direct current and  constant+alternating current. It is the second class that makes it possible to weld aluminum alloys, on which an oxide film is formed, the melting point of which is higher than the melting point of aluminum itself. To remove the oxide film, the cathode sputtering method is used, i.e. alternating current is used. Such devices use 2 inverters: the first generates a constant current, the second converts direct current into alternating current of the desired frequency and shape.

seo_footer_description: Repair, diagnostics, testing and installation of power transformers.

seo_fact_capacity: Power transformer capacity — from 25 to 40,000 kVA.
seo_fact_input_voltage: Supply voltage — 6, 10, 35, 110 and 220 kV, as well as non—standard.
seo_fact_output_voltage: Output voltage - 0.23; 0.4; 0.5 and 0.66 kV, as well as non-standard.

seo_process_request: We receive the nameplate data, a description of the malfunction and available photos.
seo_process_diagnostics: We carry out inspection and defecation; if necessary, we raise the active part.
seo_process_agreement: We coordinate the scope of work after diagnosis.
seo_process_repair: We repair, replace or restore the agreed nodes.
seo_process_testing: We carry out the prescribed the scope of the inspection and testing work.
seo_timing_text: The time depends on the results of the defect, the presence of damage, the need for rewinding and configuration. We will inform you about the exact deadline after the diagnosis and approval of the scope of work.
seo_logistics_workshop: The work is being carried out at our own logistics base in Ekibastuz. Preliminary departure of specialists, dismantling, delivery for repair and re—installation are possible - the conditions are agreed separately.
seo_documents_text: The composition of control operations, tests and issued documents is determined by the type of equipment and the agreed volume of repairs. The list is fixed before the start of work.
seo_warranty_text: Warranty conditions depend on the results of the defect and the agreed composition of the repair. The specific conditions are specified in the offer and the order documents.
seo_region_equipment: We accept power oil and dry transformers, KTP and individual units. The possibility of repair is determined after receiving the equipment data and diagnostics.
seo_region_faults: The reason for the request may be overheating, oil leakage, damage to the inputs and seals, reduced insulation resistance, noise, protection activation or damage to the windings.
seo_remote_region_logistics: Equipment from the region is accepted with delivery to the workshop in Ekibastuz. The method of transportation, dismantling and return delivery are agreed upon after receiving the dimensions, weight and nameplate data.
seo_pavlodar_logistics: We work with customers of Pavlodar and Pavlodar region. The possibility of departure, dismantling and delivery of equipment to the Ekibastuz workshop is determined on request.

seo_article_next_step: To pre-assess the situation, send a photo of the nameplate, power, voltage, description of the signs and circumstances of their appearance.
seo_article_capital_title: How to understand that a transformer needs major repairs
seo_article_capital_meta_description: What signs indicate the need for transformer overhaul and why the decision is made after a defect.
seo_article_capital_lead: One sign rarely gives a definitive answer: the decision on major repairs is made after diagnosis and evaluation of the active part.
seo_article_capital_body_1: Major repairs are considered when local restoration is insufficient: damaged windings, insulation, magnetic circuit or several connected nodes.
seo_article_capital_body_2: The volume cannot be reliably determined by external inspection alone. An oil transformer may require lifting the active part and successive defecation.
seo_article_capital_point_1: Repeated protection trips or emergency shutdown.
seo_article_capital_point_2: Overheating, noise changes, insulation odor or traces of internal damage.
seo_article_capital_point_3: Unsatisfactory condition of windings, insulation and fasteners according to diagnostic results.
seo_article_rewinding_title: Transformer repair with and without rewinding
seo_article_rewinding_meta_title: Repair transformers with and without rewinding: the difference
seo_article_rewinding_meta_description: When the transformer is repaired without rewinding, and when it is necessary to manufacture or replace the high-voltage and low-voltage windings.
seo_article_rewinding_lead: Rewinding is not necessary for every repair: the choice depends on the condition of the wire, insulation, geometry of the windings and measurement results.
seo_article_rewinding_body_1: Rewinding can be dispensed with if the windings remain functional, and defects relate to inputs, seals, oil, connections or other maintainable components.
seo_article_rewinding_body_2: In case of inter-turn short circuits, breaks, strong deformations and irreversible damage to the insulation are considered by rewinding the high-voltage, low-voltage or replacing the winding block.
seo_article_rewinding_point_1: Do not make a decision to rewind based on external signs only.
seo_article_rewinding_point_2: Compare the cost of restoration with the amount of confirmed damage.
seo_article_rewinding_point_3: After intervention, provide for coordinated inspections and tests.
seo_article_testing_title: What tests are needed after transformer repair
seo_article_testing_meta_description: Why are transformers tested after repair, and what determines the scope of the test procedures and documentation?
seo_article_testing_lead: The tests confirm the result of the work performed, but their composition depends on the equipment and the actual intervention.
seo_article_testing_body_1: After the current repair and after work with the active part, a different amount of control is required. It is determined by the type of transformer, voltage class and replaced nodes.
seo_article_testing_body_2: The list of measurements and issued documents must be agreed upon before the start of the repair so that the result meets the customer's task.
seo_article_testing_point_1: Record the initial data and the amount of repair performed.
seo_article_testing_point_2: Coordinate the list of control operations.
seo_article_testing_point_3: Check the set of final documents before issuing the equipment.
seo_article_tm_title: TM, TMZ and TMG: differences and typical malfunctions
seo_article_tm_meta_title: Transformers TM, TMZ, TMG: differences and repairs
seo_article_tm_meta_description: How do the TM, TMZ and TMG transformers differ and which malfunctions require diagnosis and repair.
seo_article_tm_lead: The TM, TMZ and TMG series relate to oil transformers, but differ in tank design and the method of compensating for changes in oil volume.
seo_article_tm_body_1: Design differences affect the inspection procedure, the range of seals, oil handling and access to individual components.
seo_article_tm_body_2: The same external signs may have different causes, so the series and full nameplate data are needed already at the preliminary assessment stage.
seo_article_tm_point_1: Oil leakage and the condition of welds or seals.
seo_article_tm_point_2: Condition of the inputs, contact connections and insulation.
seo_article_tm_point_3: Overheating, noise and signs of damage to the windings.
seo_article_ktp_title: Repair of KTP 10/0.4 kV: stages and documents
seo_article_ktp_meta_title: Repair of KTP 10/0.4 kV: stages of work
seo_article_ktp_meta_description: How is the repair of KTP 10/0.4 kV: inspection of transformer and equipment, approval, repair and inspection.
seo_article_ktp_lead: The CTP includes not only a power transformer, therefore, the defect is carried out taking into account the equipment of the high and low sides.
seo_article_ktp_body_1: First, the completeness, circuit and malfunctions are recorded, then the transformer, switching equipment, insulation and contact connections are evaluated separately.
seo_article_ktp_body_2: After approval, repairs and scheduled inspections of equipment of 0.4 and 10 kV are carried out. The set of documents depends on the composition of the order.
seo_article_ktp_point_1: Transfer the diagram, nameplate data and description of the shutdown.
seo_article_ktp_point_2: Coordinate the repair boundaries of the transformer and KTP equipment.
seo_article_ktp_point_3: Clarify installation, delivery and final checks.
seo_article_emergency_title: Transformer emergency exit: what to do in the first hours
seo_article_emergency_meta_description: What to record after an emergency shutdown of the transformer and what data to transfer to the repair organization.
seo_article_emergency_lead: The first steps should preserve safety, initial data and the ability to correctly determine the cause of damage.
seo_article_emergency_body_1: Do not turn on the equipment again without the required check. Record the protection readings, external signs, sound, smell, traces of oil and the circumstances of the shutdown.
seo_article_emergency_body_2: After ensuring safety, prepare a photo of the nameplate and damage. This data will help determine the format of diagnostics, transportation, and repairs.
seo_article_emergency_point_1: Ensure the safe disabled state of the equipment.
seo_article_emergency_point_2: Save the protection readings and the chronology of the event.
seo_article_emergency_point_3: Do not disassemble the components until the condition is fixed and the diagnosis is approved.
seo_article_diagnostics_title: Transformer diagnostics with lifting of the active part
seo_article_diagnostics_meta_title: How is the diagnosis with lifting of the active part
seo_article_diagnostics_meta_description: Which allows you to check the lifting of the active part of the oil transformer and how the results affect the amount of repair.
seo_article_diagnostics_lead: Lifting of the active part allows you to inspect the components that cannot be fully evaluated from the outside, and justify the scope of repairs.
seo_article_diagnostics_body_1: After preparation and opening, check the available parts of the windings, insulation, fasteners, connections and the condition of the active part.
seo_article_diagnostics_body_2: Detected defects are recorded and used to coordinate repairs without rewinding, rewinding individual windings or deeper restoration.
seo_article_diagnostics_point_1: Prepare nameplate data and operational history.
seo_article_diagnostics_point_2: Record the results of inspection and defects.
seo_article_diagnostics_point_3: Coordinate repairs only after assessing the detected damage.
